query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-vla: unifying vision-language-action modeling across tasks, envir" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it directly addresses the user's domain of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) modeling and proposes a specific architectural extension (thinking-with-image reasoning) that is highly relevant to the "extending" aspect of the user's research question, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (b) for independent/dependent variables on the same domain.
